name: Qindynasty
attacked: 朕在，当守土开疆，扫平四夷，护我社稷
defeated: 朕亡，亦将身化龙魂，佑我华夏永世不衰
introduction: 泰山不让土壤，故能成其大；河海不择细流，故能就其深
afterPeace: 战事已毕，或可共庆太平
uniques: [Military] units gain the [军功授爵] promotion
Triggers a [百家争鸣] event <every [5] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [1]>

name: Sheng Tang
startIntroPart1: 愿天可汗受天命、抚万民、开疆拓土，开创大唐盛世！
startIntroPart2: 太宗李世民，贞观之治的开创者。起兵晋阳，平定天下，被四方尊为「天可汗」。大唐疆域辽阔，三省六部制统御天下，各道州县万民归心。陛下，贞观之治的辉煌将由您来延续！
introduction: Welcome, traveler, to the Great Tang! Under the reign of the Heavenly Khan, our empire flourishes like no other.
declaringWar: The Son of Heaven has spoken — the divine punishment of the Great Tang shall descend upon you!
attacked: You dare challenge the Heavenly Khan? The armies of the Great Tang will crush your insolence.
defeated: Even the mightiest golden age must come to an end... the Great Tang falls, but its glory shall never be forgotten.
neutralHello: Greetings from the Great Tang Empire. May peace and prosperity be with you.
tradeRequest: The Great Tang is always open to trade. Shall we negotiate an agreement?
uniques: [+20]% Production when constructing [Wonder] wonders [in all cities]
Triggers a [Imperial Examination] event <every [5] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [65]>
Triggers a [茶经问世] event <every [5] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [40]>

name: Late Tang
startIntroPart1: 大唐气数将尽，藩镇割据，社稷危矣！陛下当力挽狂澜，中兴大唐！
startIntroPart2: 唐宪宗李纯，晚唐最有作为的皇帝之一。安史之乱后，藩镇割据，朝政腐败，大唐已不复昔日辉煌。但您力主削藩，起用裴度、李愬等名臣，元和中兴指日可待。陛下，大厦将倾，唯您可扶！
introduction: The Tang Dynasty still stands, though its golden days are behind it. Do not underestimate us.
declaringWar: We may be weakened, but the spirit of Tang still burns. To arms!
attacked: You think us easy prey? You shall learn the cost of underestimating the Tang.
defeated: The sun has set on the Great Tang... may history remember us kindly.
neutralHello: Greetings. The Tang Empire welcomes you, for now.
hateHello: Speak. The Emperor's patience is not infinite.
tradeRequest: Trade benefits all parties involved. Let us discuss terms.
uniques: [-15]% Production when constructing [Military] units [in all cities]
Triggers a [Imperial Examination] event <every [5] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [65]>
Triggers a [削藩之议] event <every [20] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [40]>
Triggers a [局势检测] event <every [5] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [1]> <hidden from users>
Triggers a [临朝问政] event <every [15] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [1]> <hidden from users>
Triggers a [宦官专权] event <every [20] turns> <upon turn end> <when above [7] [SeparatismIndex]> <after turn number [40]> <hidden from users>
Triggers a [新朝征服] event <if [京城] is not constructed> <upon turn end> <after turn number [5]> <hidden from users>

name: MongolEmpire
startIntroPart1: 草原上的狼群，只有最强者才能统领！
startIntroPart2: 铁木真，草原上的雄主，统一蒙古各部，被尊为成吉思汗。您的铁蹄曾踏遍欧亚，建立了空前庞大的帝国。大汗，长生天庇佑着您，蒙古的铁骑将再次席卷天下！
introduction: 我是成吉思汗，蒙古的大汗。草原的子民向你致意。
declaringWar: 长生天在上！蒙古的铁骑将踏平你们！
attacked: 你们竟敢挑战大汗的权威？很好，那就让你们领教蒙古铁骑的厉害！
defeated: 长生天……我的子孙将继承我的遗志……
hateHello: 有事快说，大汗没有耐心。
tradeRequest: 草原上的商路永远畅通。你带什么来交换？
uniques: Triggers a [忽里勒台大会] event <every [35] turns> <upon turn end> <after turn number [35]>
